name: Sweet Potato Puff
recipeIngredient: 2 medium sweet potatoes, cooked and peeled
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cooked and peeled sweet potatoes in a bowl.
2. Attach the bowl to a standing mixer and set it to speed 2. Beat for 30 seconds.
3. Add milk, sugar, eggs, butter, nutmeg, and cinnamon. Increase the speed to 4 and beat for an additional minute.
4. Pour the mixture into a greased 9-inch pie plate.
5. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 20 minutes or until set.
6. Spread the crunchy praline topping evenly over the hot sweet potatoes.
7. Return the dish to the oven and bake for an additional 10 minutes.
8. Remove from the oven and serve immediately.
CRUNCHY PRALINE TOPPING INSTRUCTIONS:
1. In a separate bowl, combine melted butter or margarine, cornflake cereal, chopped nuts, and brown sugar.
2. Attach the bowl to a standing mixer with a flat beater attachment.
3. Set the speed to stir and mix for 15 seconds.
